description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe featuring a predominantly black upper with intricate, subtle floral or paisley patterns throughout the surface. The shoe is accented with deep red elements, including the laces, midsole trim, and heel band, giving it a bold and stylish appearance. The outsole is thick and robust, with sculpted, angular shapes that suggest enhanced grip and support, suitable for urban environments. A visible logo and branding are present on the side near the ankle and on the tongue, both in white and red, adding to its distinctive look. The shoe appears to be constructed from synthetic leather or textile with rubber components for the sole, and is designed for comfort and durability. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, making it suitable for both casual wear and athletic activities.
description: A black high-top athletic shoe with red accents, intricate surface patterns, and bold branding, designed for urban style and performance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the detailed black patterned upper, red swooping accent, and visible side logo near the ankle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red laces, patterned toe box, and prominent tongue branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar black and red detailing, visible side logo, and sculpted sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the red heel band, back logo, and padded collar.
attribute_logo: White and red logo on the tongue and side near the ankle, featuring stylized text and a chess piece motif.
